review.rationale: Approved after exact-span review: FY23 and FY24 support scaling AI infrastructure while constraining operating-expense growth; FY22 preserves the broad-demand boundary; external supply remains a lead-time tactic; talent reallocation, margin guarantees, and post-outcome claims are excluded.

Approved after exact-span review: FY23 and FY24 share scale_infrastructure_constrain_opex, FY22 contrasts with scale_infrastructure_and_people, all six evidence spans belong to the cited events, and external supply remains a condition/tactic. The later policy must not elevate talent reallocation beyond the cited cost-discipline evidence.
